name: Oakley
classification_notes: Display serif typeface; one of van Leeuwen's most-viewed projects on Behance (15,665 views). Details beyond category not available from accessible sources.
summary: A display serif typeface by Berlin-based designer Mark van Leeuwen, his most popular release on Behance.
description: Oakley is van Leeuwen's highest-profile typeface release, earning over 15,000 views on Behance and sold via Creative Market. As a display serif it suits editorial headlines and premium branding contexts. Specific weight and feature details were not accessible from public sources at the time of cataloguing.
foundry_blurb: A display typeface from Berlin-based lettering artist and type designer Mark van Leeuwen.

name: Cortese
classification_notes: Display serif typeface featured in Behance Best of category. Paired companion to Cortese Sans.
summary: A display serif from van Leeuwen that earned Best of Behance recognition, designed as a serif companion to Cortese Sans.
description: Cortese is a display serif typeface recognised in the Behance Best Of category, reflecting van Leeuwen's lettering-influenced approach to type design. It forms a serif-and-sans pair with Cortese Sans, providing flexible options for editorial and brand use. Detailed weight and feature information was not accessible from public sources at the time of cataloguing.
foundry_blurb: A Best of Behance-recognised display serif from lettering artist and type designer Mark van Leeuwen.

name: Cortese Sans
classification_notes: Display sans-serif. Companion to the Cortese serif. Best of Behance featured.
summary: A display sans-serif companion to Cortese, earning Best of Behance recognition for van Leeuwen's clean type design work.
description: Cortese Sans is the sans-serif counterpart to van Leeuwen's Cortese serif, together forming a paired type system for editorial and brand applications. It earned Best of Behance recognition with nearly 10,000 views. Detailed weight and feature information was not accessible from public sources at the time of cataloguing.
foundry_blurb: The sans-serif companion to Cortese, a Best of Behance-featured display typeface from Berlin-based type designer Mark van Leeuwen.

name: Aespira
classification_notes: Display typeface, priced at $80 on Creative Market, indicating a more developed release than the smaller novelty fonts in the catalogue.
summary: A display typeface by Mark van Leeuwen, available via Creative Market and featured prominently on his Behance portfolio.
description: Aespira is one of van Leeuwen's primary typeface releases, sold at $80 on Creative Market and showcased on Behance with nearly 7,000 views. It reflects his lettering-informed approach to type design. Detailed weight and feature information was not accessible from public sources at the time of cataloguing.
foundry_blurb: A display typeface from Berlin-based lettering artist and type designer Mark van Leeuwen, available via Creative Market.

name: Magalie
classification_notes: Script or display typeface; Behance project has over 4,600 views. Priced at $110 on Creative Market, suggesting a developed release.
summary: A display typeface by Mark van Leeuwen with a script or calligraphic quality, sold via Creative Market.
description: Magalie is a display typeface from van Leeuwen's catalogue, priced at $110 and featured on Behance with over 4,600 views. His lettering background informs the calligraphic or script-influenced character typical of his named releases. Detailed weight and feature information was not accessible from public sources at the time of cataloguing.
foundry_blurb: A display typeface from Berlin-based lettering artist and type designer Mark van Leeuwen, sold via Creative Market.
